import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import axios from'axios';import{Trophy,Heart,Music}from'lucide-react';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Ranking=()=>{const[topSongs,setTopSongs]=useState([]);useEffect(()=>{// Gọi API lấy bảng xếp hạng
axios.get('http://localhost:5000/api/songs/ranking').then(res=>setTopSongs(res.data)).catch(err=>console.error(err));},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{padding:'40px',maxWidth:'800px',margin:'0 auto',fontFamily:'Arial, sans-serif'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{textAlign:'center',marginBottom:'40px'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Trophy,{size:60,color:"#FFD700",style:{marginBottom:'10px'}}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{style:{color:'#1db954',margin:0},children:"B\u1EA2NG X\u1EBEP H\u1EA0NG \xC2M NH\u1EA0C"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{style:{color:'#888'},children:"Top 10 b\xE0i h\xE1t \u0111\u01B0\u1EE3c y\xEAu th\xEDch nh\u1EA5t tr\xEAn P2TUNES"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{background:'#fff',borderRadius:'20px',overflow:'hidden',boxShadow:'0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)'},children:[topSongs.map((song,index)=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:itemStyle(index),children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:rankBadgeStyle(index),children:index+1}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:"http://localhost:5000".concat(song.imageUrl),alt:"cover",style:{width:'60px',height:'60px',borderRadius:'10px',objectFit:'cover',marginRight:'20px'}}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{flex:1},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{fontWeight:'bold',fontSize:'18px',color:'#333'},children:song.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{color:'#777',fontSize:'14px'},children:song.artist})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{textAlign:'right',display:'flex',alignItems:'center',gap:'8px'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{style:{fontSize:'20px',fontWeight:'bold',color:'#ff4d4d'},children:song.likesCount||0}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Heart,{size:22,fill:"#ff4d4d",color:"#ff4d4d"})]})]},song._id)),topSongs.length===0&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{padding:'40px',textAlign:'center',color:'#888'},children:"Ch\u01B0a c\xF3 d\u1EEF li\u1EC7u x\u1EBFp h\u1EA1ng."})]})]});};// --- CSS STYLES ---
const itemStyle=index=>({display:'flex',alignItems:'center',padding:'20px',borderBottom:'1px solid #eee',background:index===0?'#fffef0':'white',// Bài Top 1 có nền vàng nhạt
transition:'transform 0.2s',cursor:'pointer'});const rankBadgeStyle=index=>({width:'35px',height:'35px',borderRadius:'50%',display:'flex',alignItems:'center',justifyContent:'center',marginRight:'20px',fontWeight:'bold',fontSize:'18px',// Màu sắc huy chương cho Top 3
background:index===0?'#FFD700':index===1?'#C0C0C0':index===2?'#CD7F32':'#f0f0f0',color:index<3?'white':'#888'});export default Ranking;
